title: Builders' Jetpack Mod
description: Adds a late game jetpack that makes building in survival more enjoyable!
body:
# You want to build your survival imperium but you are fed up with scaffoldings?
## The Builders' Jetpack will help!

Made of the ancient levitating forces of echo shards, the Builder's Jetpack allows you
to fly similar to creative. Equip it, make sure you have Jetpack fuel in your inventory and launch in the air by pressing Shift + Space! It is deactivated as soon as you land
on the ground again.

The Restacker enchantment will refill blocks from your inventory to your hand when
you run empty while building.

Thanks to Grice4k for making the 3D model!

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

### Builders' Jetpack:
![Jetpack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04c9ce1ae69672e1c0221b5dbefaf53eddac68b.png)

### Jetpack fuel:
![Jetpack fuel recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cbc8f32e571798749b942a4765b7af24e8da3ab.png)

</details>


## Why is it so expensive to craft?
We all know the 2 week Minecraft phase. You start a world, grind and enchant diamond tools, upgrade them to netherite, beat the Ender Dragon and maybe build a beacon. Then it starts to lose its charme.

What we forget in our grind, is that the core of Minecraft is building. And maybe we forget that because it is so painful to build without being able to fly like hummingbird.

The Builder's Jetpack solves this problem by unlocking a way to build comfortably. But because it is such a gamechanger and we love to grind, it is a late game item. 


## So I don't need an Elytra anymore?
Yes you do! The Builder's Jetpack is not designed to travel long distances, it is designed to give you hummingbird-like flight making building more comfortable.


## Upcoming features:
- dynamic fuel display on the jetpack
- speed upgrades
- jetpack trims which exchange particles
